description: Verify the AI native product loop: perceive, plan, execute, reflect, iterate, with explicit user-confirmed iteration.

patterns: Confirm, Tune Through Conversation, Pause, Reject

command: set -euo pipefail; tmp=$(mktemp -d); trap 'rm -rf "$tmp"' EXIT; cp -a agent-system "$tmp/agent-system"; export DIGITAL_OFFICE_SYSTEM_HOME="$tmp/agent-system"; ./agent-system/bin/office-system loop-start --run-id loop-test --task 'Build a governed AI native product loop' >/dev/null; ./agent-system/bin/office-system loop-stage --run-id loop-test --stage perceive --status started --summary 'Context gathered' >/dev/null; ./agent-system/bin/office-system iteration-proposal-create --title 'Tighten workflow gate' --target harness --summary 'Add a regression gate after reflection' --body 'Add a harness check after reflection.' --expected-impact 'Fewer workflow drifts' --risk 'Could slow delivery' --rollback 'Remove the proposed gate' --run-id loop-test --regression-check 'harness-runner --task all --no-write' > "$tmp/proposal.json"; pid=$(python3 -c 'import json,sys; print(json.load(open(sys.argv[1]))["proposal_id"])' "$tmp/proposal.json"); set +e; ./agent-system/bin/office-system iteration-proposal-apply --proposal-id "$pid" > "$tmp/apply.out" 2> "$tmp/apply.err"; code=$?; set -e; test "$code" -ne 0; ./agent-system/bin/office-system iteration-proposal-decision --proposal-id "$pid" --decision confirm --message 'User confirmed' >/dev/null; ./agent-system/bin/office-system iteration-proposal-apply --proposal-id "$pid" --confirmed --regression-result 'harness passed' --artifact 'agent-system/harness/tasks/ai-native-loop-production.json' > "$tmp/apply-ok.json"; python3 -c 'import json,sys; data=json.load(open(sys.argv[1])); assert data["status"] == "applied_verified"' "$tmp/apply-ok.json"
